summary: Ice Mountain stage decomp/matching PR touching gricemt code, stage ground variable layouts, prototypes, and one symbol split. The bot report records 13 new gricemt matches, 11 unmatched-item improvements, and one broken 4-byte match caused by removing fn_801F91A4 as a separate symbol.

key_files.role: Main Ice Mountain implementation updates: recovered functions, type/layout usage, assert macro cleanup, helper calls, data declarations, and matching tactics.
evidence_refs: metadata.changed_files[src/melee/gr/gricemt.c]: +605/-226, 36 hunks
raw_diff: gricemt.c includes baselib/debug.h and baselib/forward.h
raw_diff: gricemt.c replaces __assert blocks with HSD_ASSERT in grIceMt_801F686C, grIceMt_801F796C, grIceMt_801F7A2C, grIceMt_801F8B10, grIceMt_801F96E0
raw_diff: gricemt.c changes gp->gv.corneria uses to gp->gv.icemt and widespread gp->gv.icemt.xF8 uses to gp->gv.icemt2.xF8
text_corpus: bot report lists 13 new gricemt matches and 11 improvements

key_files.role: GroundVars layout refinement for Ice Mountain, including explicit offsets/padding and moving GObj pointer array storage into grIceMt_GroundVars2.
evidence_refs: metadata.changed_files[src/melee/gr/types.h]: +37/-35, 1 hunk
raw_diff: grIceMt_GroundVars gains explicit offset comments, pad fields, x100/x108 arrays
raw_diff: grIceMt_GroundVars2 gains explicit offsets and HSD_GObj* xF8[20]

key_files.role: Prototype and parameter-type cleanup for recovered gricemt functions and IceMountainParams fields.
evidence_refs: metadata.changed_files[src/melee/gr/gricemt.h]: +7/-8, 3 hunks
raw_diff: IceMountainParams xB0/xB4 changed from float to s16*
raw_diff: fn_801F8E58 and fn_801F9150 prototypes changed to s32 return with extra s32* parameter
raw_diff: grIceMt_801F96E0 now takes struct grIceMt_GroundVars*
raw_diff: grIceMt_801FA0BC changed from UNK_RET to void
raw_diff: grIceMt_801FA500 now takes HSD_GObj* and HSD_JObj*

key_files.role: Symbol metadata adjustment for adjacent gricemt functions.
evidence_refs: metadata.changed_files[config/GALE01/symbols.txt]: +1/-2, 1 hunk
raw_diff: fn_801F9150 size changed from 0x54 to 0x58 and fn_801F91A4 entry removed

what_changed.text: Recovered or improved multiple Ice Mountain functions in src/melee/gr/gricemt.c, with the bot report claiming 13 new matches and 11 improvements in the gricemt unit.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: 13 new matches
text_corpus issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: 11 improvements in unmatched items

what_changed.text: Corrected Ice Mountain ground variable access away from unrelated or incorrect union members, including replacing gv.corneria accesses with gv.icemt and moving many xF8 object-array users to gv.icemt2.xF8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_801F7728 changes gp->gv.corneria.xC8/xC4 to gp->gv.icemt.xC8/xC4
raw_diff: grIceMt_801F7A2C changes gp->gv.corneria.xC8 to gp->gv.icemt.xC8
raw_diff: destroy/setup functions change gp->gv.icemt.xF8[i] to gp->gv.icemt2.xF8[i]

what_changed.text: Replaced direct __assert blocks with HSD_ASSERT where file/line evidence was preserved by line-number arguments.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_801F686C uses HSD_ASSERT(0x27C, bg_gobj), HSD_ASSERT(0x27D, jobj), etc.
raw_diff: grIceMt_801F796C uses HSD_ASSERT(0x475, mgobj) and HSD_ASSERT(0x47A, mgobj)
raw_diff: grIceMt_801F7A2C uses HSD_ASSERT(0x4C3, mgobj) and HSD_ASSERT(0x4C5, jobj)

what_changed.text: Updated headers to reflect recovered signatures and field types, removing several unknown or stale prototypes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.h fn_801F8E58 UNK_RET -> s32 fn_801F8E58(Ground_GObj*, s32*)
raw_diff: gricemt.h fn_801F9150 IceMountainParams* -> s32 fn_801F9150(HSD_GObj*, s32*)
raw_diff: gricemt.h grIceMt_801FA0BC UNK_RET -> void
raw_diff: gricemt.h grIceMt_801FA500 adds HSD_JObj* parameter

what_changed.text: Adjusted symbol metadata by folding fn_801F91A4 into fn_801F9150's size range.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt fn_801F9150 size 0x54 -> 0x58; fn_801F91A4 removed
text_corpus issue_comment: bot reports Total functions -1 and fn_801F91A4 broken match -4 bytes

smart_moves.text: Using the correct grIceMt GroundVars union arms made accesses more reviewable and aligned with the loaded standard preferring typed fields over unrelated union arms.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gv.corneria accesses replaced with gv.icemt
raw_diff: grIceMt_GroundVars and grIceMt_GroundVars2 layouts updated in types.h
decomp_standards.typed-fields-over-pointer-math

smart_moves.text: Header prototypes were updated alongside recovered bodies instead of leaving UNK_RET or stale parameter lists.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.h prototype changes for fn_801F8E58, fn_801F9150, grIceMt_801F96E0, grIceMt_801FA0BC, grIceMt_801FA500
decomp_standards.truthful-headers-and-includes

smart_moves.text: Assert cleanup used HSD_ASSERT while keeping original gricemt.c line numbers, which matches the accepted assert/report cleanup standard.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __assert("gricemt.c", line, ...) blocks replaced with HSD_ASSERT(line, expr)
decomp_standards.assert-report-macros

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage TUs, verify the owning GroundVars union arm before matching around offsets; this PR shows gricemt code becoming cleaner when gv.corneria and misplaced gv.icemt xF8 accesses were replaced by gv.icemt/gv.icemt2 fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_801F7728 changes gv.corneria.xC8/xC4 to gv.icemt.xC8/xC4
raw_diff: grIceMt_801F7A2C changes gv.corneria.xC8 to gv.icemt.xC8
raw_diff: grIceMt_GroundVars2 adds HSD_GObj* xF8[20]
raw_diff: destroy callbacks use gp->gv.icemt2.xF8

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function proves a signature, update the owning header in the same change so call sites can use meaningful typed parameters instead of stale UNK_RET or wrong argument types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.h fn_801F8E58, fn_801F9150, grIceMt_801F96E0, grIceMt_801FA0BC, grIceMt_801FA500 prototype changes

decomp_lessons.lesson: Symbol metadata may need to change when function boundaries are recovered; here fn_801F9150 expanded by 4 bytes and the separate fn_801F91A4 entry disappeared, matching the bot's function-count decrease.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt fn_801F9150 size 0x58 and fn_801F91A4 removed
text_corpus issue_comment: Total functions 19829 (-1)
text_corpus issue_comment: fn_801F91A4 broken match -4 bytes

naming_conventions.convention: Use local role names for clear object roles, such as bg_gobj for a background HSD_GObj and mgobj for material/ground object lookups, while retaining address-style names where semantics are not proven.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_801F686C renames local gobj to bg_gobj
raw_diff: grIceMt_801F796C declares HSD_GObj* mgobj
raw_diff: global function and data names remain grIceMt_/grIm_/fn_ address-style

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered Ice Mountain row data received a local descriptive typedef and field comments while many uncertain fields stayed offset-style xNN.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef IceMtRowData with id comment and f32 x4/x8
raw_diff: grIceMt_GroundVars fields remain xC4, xC6, x108, etc.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in several recovered gricemt functions to preserve stack/codegen shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(0x10) in grIceMt_801F686C
raw_diff: PAD_STACK(8) in grIceMt_801F796C
raw_diff: PAD_STACK(0x4) in grIceMt_801F7D94, grIceMt_801F7F70, grIceMt_801F83EC, grIceMt_801F865C
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The diff shows tactic use, and the bot report shows matching improvement, but no reviewer comment or explicit local objdiff transcript explains each PAD_STACK instance.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Small local stack structs were introduced to copy packed data before passing it as s16* to grIceMt_801F8CDC.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GrIm588 sp14 assigned from grIm_804DB588/grIm_804DB58C then cast to s16*
raw_diff: anonymous struct sp14 receives grIm_804DB590/grIm_804DB594 and similar pairs
raw_diff: GrIm825C sp14 copies grIm_803B825C.hi and x8 before grIceMt_801F8CDC

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Constants that were previously named float data symbols were inlined as ordinary literals where the code used 0.0f comparisons and assignments.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gp->gv.icemt.xE4 and xD4 assignments change from grIm_804DB574 to 0.0f
raw_diff: comparisons against grIm_804DB574 change to 0.0f

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Macro cleanup replaced generated assert branches with HSD_ASSERT and used project helpers such as HSD_JObjSetTranslateY/HSD_JObjGetTranslationY.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_ASSERT replacements in grIceMt_801F686C and grIceMt_801F7A2C
raw_diff: grIceMt_801F8B10 uses HSD_JObjGetTranslationY and HSD_JObjSetTranslateY flow

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use the owning GroundVars arm in stage TUs
accepted_candidate_records.text: In gricemt, replacing unrelated gv.corneria accesses and misplaced gv.icemt.xF8 users with gv.icemt/gv.icemt2 fields coincided with major matching progress and cleaner typed access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gv.corneria.xC8/xC4 -> gv.icemt.xC8/xC4
raw_diff: gp->gv.icemt.xF8[i] -> gp->gv.icemt2.xF8[i]
text_corpus issue_comment: 13 new matches and 11 improvements

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep gricemt headers truthful as functions are recovered
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR updated gricemt.h prototypes when recovered bodies proved return types and parameters, replacing stale UNK_RET and incorrect signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_801F8E58, fn_801F9150, grIceMt_801F96E0, grIceMt_801FA0BC, grIceMt_801FA500 prototype changes

accepted_candidate_records.title: Record evidence for PAD_STACK in gricemt-style recovery
accepted_candidate_records.text: Several newly matched gricemt functions used narrow PAD_STACK calls, but the slice only provides bot-level match evidence; future curation should require per-function verifier context before treating any specific padding as durable style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK in grIceMt_801F686C, grIceMt_801F796C, grIceMt_801F7D94, grIceMt_801F7F70, grIceMt_801F83EC, grIceMt_801F865C
text_corpus issue_comment: bot report with new matches

source_update_candidates.title: gricemt uses grIceMt_GroundVars and grIceMt_GroundVars2 for different state regions
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2531 refines Ice Mountain ground state: grIceMt_GroundVars carries scalar/short state and arrays such as x100/x108, while grIceMt_GroundVars2 carries JObj fields and HSD_GObj* xF8[20].
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_GroundVars layout hunk
raw_diff: grIceMt_GroundVars2 layout hunk
raw_diff: gricemt.c uses gp->gv.icemt2.xF8 in setup/destroy paths
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful path/type fact, but should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Stage union-arm cleanup example
source_update_candidates.text: Use PR 2531 as an example for the existing typed-fields-over-pointer-math standard: do not borrow an unrelated GroundVars arm such as gv.corneria in gricemt when a stage-owned gv.icemt layout can express the access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_801F7728 and grIceMt_801F7A2C replace gv.corneria with gv.icemt
decomp_standards.typed-fields-over-pointer-math
source_update_candidates.reason: This is an illustrative example for an already-loaded global standard, not a new accepted rule.

source_update_candidates.title: fn_801F91A4 folded into fn_801F9150 in symbols
source_update_candidates.text: In PR 2531, config/GALE01/symbols.txt removed fn_801F91A4 and expanded fn_801F9150 from size 0x54 to 0x58.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunk
text_corpus issue_comment: Total functions -1 and fn_801F91A4 broken match
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol-boundary fact candidate; verify against current symbols before adding to path facts.

rejection_notes: Do not promote every PAD_STACK use in this PR as accepted style; the slice lacks per-function objdiff rationale.
Do not claim human reviewer approval or rationale; no human review comments are present.
Do not claim all listed bot improvements were fully matched; only the 13 items in the bot's new-match table are reported as 100%, while 11 others are improvements.
Do not generalize gricemt's xC4/xF8/x108 meanings beyond the fields and call patterns shown in this PR slice.
